windows.transcript: candle makers would probably say that it is the wick that makes the candle. That is because a well -crafted candle needs to be smooth burning and smokeless.

The flame flickers slightly atop the pale candle in the darkness.
Close-up of the burning candle flame, tall and luminous over the wax pool on a black background.
